sections.content: In a modern corporate scenario, where the communication is the key to business, it becomes utmost important to have effective communication with the internal as well as external customers. Effective interpersonal communication aims at being more accommodative and empathetic to listen to other people’s perspective, and also allows to download your ideas more succinctly and assertively. Interpersonal communication is a two-day workshop that enables the participants to develop communication skills to understand and be understood at all the times. It also helps the participants, create better relationship with all the stakeholders encompassing all the channels of communication. The program is made highly interactive with the use of stories, video clips, games and roleplays.

content: Understand the barriers to communication and the importance of effective communication
Active and reflective listening and understanding
Sending the messages that are clear, crisp and impactful
Making meaningful conversation and meetings with clear objectives
Understand Transactional Analysis and manage conflicts
Use Effective body language to be in sync with your verbal discourse
